\\[3pt]\parbox{\linewidth}{\footnotesize Orbit-local running means over $|t' - t| \le W$ within the same orbit segment and surface ($W = 10/30/100$\,s $\approx$ $\pm$67/200/675\,km along track), applied to the identical footprints, guards, and TCCON chain as the deep ensemble. Scatter: mean within-overpass standard deviation of the product. The smoothers collapse the scatter more strongly than the deep ensemble but do not reproduce its station-day bias reduction (Sect.~4.5, Figs.~10 and \ref{app-fig:smoother_null_full}).}
